publisher._POLICY: Launch publish policy — RATIFIED 2026-07-15 (docs/DECISIONS/0001-manual-publish-policy.md). adapter='manual': the launch path is the outbox (render md+html for Bradley to paste). programmatic_notes_enabled=false is PERMANENT — Notes automation is never load-bearing and is never attempted (spoofed-header writes to undocumented endpoints are off the table; posting one is what got the account suspended 2026-07-14). programmatic_draft_creation_allowed=false FOR NOW but MAY be revisited post-appeal — draft creation is a quiet non-publishing write that drew no enforcement; flip it (and adapter to 'auto') only per the doc's conditions.
